zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hethe於1396年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Thomas Heath37歲，母親Elizabeth de Mountford40歲。她於大約1414年與Nicholas Drury在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年10月30日在英國艾可享年83歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可瑟斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Hethe于1396年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Thomas Heath37岁，母亲Elizabeth de Mountford40岁。她于大约1414年与Nicholas Drury在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年10月30日在英国艾可享年83岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可瑟斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Normand, Philippe.
German: habitational name from Methau in Saxony.
Germanized form of Sorbian Mět or Měto (see Mieth ).

variants.name: Mieth
meanings: Germanized form of Sorbian Mět: either from a short form of the Old Sorbian personal name Mětisław, composed of the Old Slavic elements met ‘to throw’ (from metati) + slav ‘glory’ or ‘famous’ (from slava ‘glory’), or from a pet form of Mertyn, a Lower Sorbian form of Martin .
German: nickname from Middle High German miet ‘reward’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hethe was born in 1396, in Suffolk, England, her father, Thomas Heath, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth de Mountford, was 40. She married Nicholas Drury about 1414, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 30 October 1479, in Essex, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Thurston, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Hethe est née en 1396, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Heath, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Mountford, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Drury environ 1414, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 octobre 1479, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Hethe 1396 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Heath 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Mountford 40. Sie hat um 1414 in Suffolk, England Nicholas Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Oktober 1479 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Thurston, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hethe è nata il nel 1396 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Heath, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Mountford, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Drury circa 1414, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 ottobre 1479, nel Essex, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Thurston, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Hetheが1396年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Thomas Heathは37歳，母Elizabeth de Mountfordは40歳であった。約1414年にイギリススフォルクでNicholas Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年10月30日にイギリスエセックスで83歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクスウルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hethe(이)가 1396년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Heath(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Mountford(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1414년 영국 수폴크에서 Nicholas Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 10월 30일 영국 에세스에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스르스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hethe nasceu em 1396, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Heath, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Mountford, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Drury aproximadamente 1414, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1479, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Hethe родилась в 1396 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Heath было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Mountford, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Drury около 1414 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 октября 1479 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Hethe nació en 1396, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Heath, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Mountford, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Nicholas Drury aproximadamente 1414, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1479, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
